messages.content: Hey everyone! Hope you’re all having a chill day 😊 Anyone up for hanging out this weekend?
Hey Charlie! I’d be down to hang out 😊 Do you have something in mind or should we just wing it?
Ooo, hanging out sounds fun! I’m free Saturday after 3 if that works for everyone. Maybe we could try that new ramen place or just do a movie night?
Both sound awesome, honestly! I’ve been craving ramen 🍜 but a chill movie night is always fun too. I’m free Saturday after 3 as well!
I’m glad I’m not the only one craving ramen 😂 Should we do ramen first and then head back for a movie? That way we get the best of both worlds!
That sounds like the perfect plan! I’ve been wanting to try that ramen place too. Plus, movies after means we can just lounge in comfy clothes 😂 What time should we meet up?
Love it! Ramen and a movie is the dream combo 😂 I’m good for Saturday too. Want to meet at the restaurant around 4-ish? That way we miss the dinner rush and have more time to chill after!
4 sounds perfect to me! I’ll look up if we need to book a table or if it’s walk-in. Can’t wait to see everyone and eat ALL the noodles 😂
4 works for me too! Can’t wait for noodles and hanging out with you all. Thanks for checking the booking, Diana! Should we each bring a movie suggestion for later? 🍜🎬
Movie suggestion swap sounds fun! I’ll bring a couple of options—maybe something light or funny? Excited for Saturday already 😄 Let me know if anyone has special ramen requests, I’ll check the menu!

Yesss, I love the idea of bringing movie suggestions! I’m always down for a good comedy or something a little weird 😅 No special ramen requests for me, I’ll probably just let the menu inspire me. So hyped for Saturday!
I’m definitely bringing one of those “so bad it’s good” movies, just as a warning 😂 And I’ll eat pretty much anything as long as it’s spicy, so I’m set. Saturday’s gonna be awesome!
This is gonna be such a good night! I’ll look through my weird movie stash and try not to traumatize anyone 😂 Also, I’m with Bob—spicy ramen is where it’s at! Counting down to Saturday!

Love how we’re all bringing our A-game to movie night 😂 I’ll make sure to brace myself for any cinematic masterpieces (or disasters) you all pick! I’m definitely going for some spicy ramen too. See you guys Saturday!
My grandfather claims he invented the high-five.

Haha this is shaping up to be the ultimate ramen + movie night 😆 I’ll bring a couple of movie picks too—promise nothing too traumatizing! Can’t wait to see everyone and eat my body weight in noodles. Saturday can’t come soon enough!
Honestly, I feel like we should make this a monthly thing if it goes well! Ramen and questionable movies might be the new tradition 😂 Can’t wait to hang out and catch up with everyone!
Monthly ramen and ridiculous movies? Count me in 😂 Who knew we’d find the perfect tradition! Can’t wait to see you all—this week has been dragging and Saturday is my light at the end of the tunnel.
I’m all for making this a regular thing! Nothing like good food and bad movies to recharge 😆 Hope everyone’s week flies by—Saturday’s going to be epic!
Omg yes, monthly ramen nights sound like the best tradition ever! 🍜 I’m 100% on board. Also, totally agree—this week needs to hurry up already. See you all soon!
We’re officially starting the best club ever 😂 I’ll bring some snacks too in case anyone wants something sweet with their ramen. Can’t wait to see you all—let the countdown begin!
Snacks on top of ramen? Charlie, you’re spoiling us 😄 Maybe I’ll bring some drinks to go with everything. This night’s about to be legendary—see you all so soon!

Yesss, this is turning into a feast 🎉 Drinks, snacks, spicy ramen, and chaotic movies—what more could we want? Thanks for bringing stuff, guys! I’ll come hungry and ready for whatever cinematic adventures you throw at me 😄
It’s honestly the dream combo 😂 I’ll try to find something fun for drinks—maybe some bubble tea? Can’t wait to see everyone’s movie choices (and reactions)! Saturday’s gonna be so much fun!
Bubble tea and ramen?? Diana you’re a genius 😍 I’m already looking forward to the food coma. Can’t wait to see everyone—it’s been way too long!

It really has been too long! This is exactly what we all need. If anyone has a bubble tea flavor request, let me know—I’ll try to mix things up! Also, can someone remind me whose place we’re invading on Saturday? My brain is already in weekend mode 😂
It’s at my place this time! Don’t worry, I’ll clear a path through my “organized chaos” before you all show up 😅 As for bubb

needle_message: My grandfather claims he invented the high-five.
